description: Agent skills for marketing-site engineers — technical QA encoded from 100+ real agency launches.

plugins.name: review-site
plugins.description: Technical QA review of marketing websites against an agency launch bar. Auto-detects Webflow / Astro / Next.js and staging vs production, then reviews indexability, metadata, structured data, accessibility, performance, semantics, forms, and security.
